# Barne- og familiedepartementet

*42 lover*

| Lov | Korttittel | Lovdata | Historikk |
|-----|-----------|---------|-----------|
| [Lov om adopsjon (adopsjonsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2017-06-16-48.md) | Adopsjonsloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2017-06-16-48) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2017-06-16-48.md) · [v2017](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2017/lover/lov-2017-06-16-48.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2017-06-16-48.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2017-06-16-48.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2017-06-16-48.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2017-06-16-48.md) |
| [Lov om anerkjennelse av utenlandske skilsmisser og separasjoner](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1978-06-02-38.md) | Lov om utenlandske skilsmisser | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1978-06-02-38) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1978-06-02-38.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1978-06-02-38.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1978-06-02-38.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1978-06-02-38.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1978-06-02-38.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1978-06-02-38.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1978-06-02-38.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1978-06-02-38.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1978-06-02-38.md) |
| [Lov om anerkjennelse og fullbyrding av utenlandske avgjørelser om foreldreansvar](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1988-07-08-72.md) | Barnebortføringsloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1988-07-08-72) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1988-07-08-72.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1988-07-08-72.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1988-07-08-72.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1988-07-08-72.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1988-07-08-72.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1988-07-08-72.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1988-07-08-72.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1988-07-08-72.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1988-07-08-72.md) |
| [Lov om avtaler om deltidsbruksrett og langtidsferieprodukter mv. (tidspartloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2012-05-25-27.md) | Tidspartloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2012-05-25-27) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2012-05-25-27.md) · [v2012](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2012/lover/lov-2012-05-25-27.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2012-05-25-27.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2012-05-25-27.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2012-05-25-27.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2012-05-25-27.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2012-05-25-27.md) |
| [Lov om barn og foreldre (barnelova)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1981-04-08-7.md) | Barnelova – bl | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1981-04-08-7) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1981-04-08-7.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1981-04-08-7.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1981-04-08-7.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1981-04-08-7.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1981-04-08-7.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1981-04-08-7.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1981-04-08-7.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1981-04-08-7.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1981-04-08-7.md) |
| [Lov om barn og foreldre (barnelova)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-06-20-40.md) | Barnelova | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2025-06-20-40) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-06-20-40.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2025-06-20-40.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2025-06-20-40.md) |
| [Lov om barneombud [barneombudsloven]](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1981-03-06-5.md) | Barneombudsloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1981-03-06-5) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1981-03-06-5.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1981-03-06-5.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1981-03-06-5.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1981-03-06-5.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1981-03-06-5.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1981-03-06-5.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1981-03-06-5.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1981-03-06-5.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1981-03-06-5.md) |
| [Lov om barnetrygd (barnetrygdloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2002-03-08-4.md) | Barnetrygdloven – btrl | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2002-03-08-4) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2002-03-08-4.md) · [v2002](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2002/lover/lov-2002-03-08-4.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-2002-03-08-4.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-2002-03-08-4.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2002-03-08-4.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2002-03-08-4.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2002-03-08-4.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2002-03-08-4.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2002-03-08-4.md) |
| [Lov om barnevern (barnevernsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2021-06-18-97.md) | Barnevernsloven – bvl | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2021-06-18-97) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2021-06-18-97.md) · [v2021](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2021/lover/lov-2021-06-18-97.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2021-06-18-97.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2021-06-18-97.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2021-06-18-97.md) |
| [Lov om behandling av forbrukerklager i Forbrukertilsynet og Forbrukerklageutvalg](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2020-06-23-98.md) | Forbrukerklageloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2020-06-23-98) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2020-06-23-98.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2020-06-23-98.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2020-06-23-98.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2020-06-23-98.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2020-06-23-98.md) |
| [Lov om behandling av opplysninger i kredittopplysningsvirksomhet (kredittopplysn](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2019-12-20-109.md) | Kredittopplysningsloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2019-12-20-109) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2019-12-20-109.md) · [v2019](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2019/lover/lov-2019-12-20-109.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2019-12-20-109.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2019-12-20-109.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2019-12-20-109.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2019-12-20-109.md) |
| [Lov om bidragsforskott (forskotteringsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1989-02-17-2.md) | Forskotteringsloven – forskl | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1989-02-17-2) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1989-02-17-2.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1989-02-17-2.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1989-02-17-2.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1989-02-17-2.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1989-02-17-2.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1989-02-17-2.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1989-02-17-2.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1989-02-17-2.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1989-02-17-2.md) |
| [Lov om ekteskap (ekteskapsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1991-07-04-47.md) | Ekteskapsloven – el | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1991-07-04-47) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1991-07-04-47.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1991-07-04-47.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1991-07-04-47.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1991-07-04-47.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1991-07-04-47.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1991-07-04-47.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1991-07-04-47.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1991-07-04-47.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1991-07-04-47.md) |
| [Lov om endringar i krisesenterlova (tydeleggjering av det kommunale ansvaret og ](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-06-20-42.md) | Endringslov til krisesenterlova | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2025-06-20-42) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-06-20-42.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2025-06-20-42.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2025-06-20-42.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i barnevernloven](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2013-06-21-63.md) | Endringslov til barnevernloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2013-06-21-63) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2013-06-21-63.md) · [v2013](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2013/lover/lov-2013-06-21-63.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2013-06-21-63.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2013-06-21-63.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2013-06-21-63.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2013-06-21-63.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2013-06-21-63.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i barnevernloven mv. (tverrfaglig helsekartlegging)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2022-03-25-13.md) | Endringslov til barnevernloven mv. | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2022-03-25-13) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2022-03-25-13.md) · [v2022](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2022/lover/lov-2022-03-25-13.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2022-03-25-13.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2022-03-25-13.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2022-03-25-13.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i barnevernloven og sosialtjenesteloven mv. (saksbehandlingsreg](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2006-12-01-65.md) | Endringslov til barnevernl. og sosialtjenestel. | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2006-12-01-65) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2006-12-01-65.md) · [v2006](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2006/lover/lov-2006-12-01-65.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-2006-12-01-65.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2006-12-01-65.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2006-12-01-65.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2006-12-01-65.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2006-12-01-65.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2006-12-01-65.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i barnevernsloven mv. (kvalitetsløftet i barnevernet)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-06-20-39.md) | Endringslov til barnevernsloven mv. | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2025-06-20-39) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-06-20-39.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2025-06-20-39.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2025-06-20-39.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i gjeldsordningsloven mv. (effektivisering og forenkling av gje](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2024-06-25-56.md) | Endringslov til gjeldsordningsloven mv. | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2024-06-25-56) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2024-06-25-56.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2024-06-25-56.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2024-06-25-56.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2024-06-25-56.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i trossamfunnsloven (aktivitets- og antallskrav)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-03-14-3.md) | Endringslov til trossamfunnsloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2025-03-14-3) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-03-14-3.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2025-03-14-3.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2025-03-14-3.md) |
| [Lov om familievernkontorer](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1997-06-19-62.md) | Familievernkontorloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1997-06-19-62) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1997-06-19-62.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1997-06-19-62.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1997-06-19-62.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1997-06-19-62.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1997-06-19-62.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1997-06-19-62.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1997-06-19-62.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1997-06-19-62.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1997-06-19-62.md) |
| [Lov om forskriftshjemmel for behandling av personopplysninger for frivillige til](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2022-06-17-44.md) | Lov om forskriftshjemmel, personopplysninger | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2022-06-17-44) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2022-06-17-44.md) · [v2022](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2022/lover/lov-2022-06-17-44.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2022-06-17-44.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2022-06-17-44.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2022-06-17-44.md) |
| [Lov om frivillig og tvungen gjeldsordning for privatpersoner (gjeldsordningslove](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1992-07-17-99.md) | Gjeldsordningsloven – gol | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1992-07-17-99) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1992-07-17-99.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1992-07-17-99.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1992-07-17-99.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1992-07-17-99.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1992-07-17-99.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1992-07-17-99.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1992-07-17-99.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1992-07-17-99.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1992-07-17-99.md) |
| [Lov om gjeldsinformasjon ved kredittvurdering av privatpersoner (gjeldsinformasj](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2017-06-16-47.md) | Gjeldsinformasjonsloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2017-06-16-47) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2017-06-16-47.md) · [v2017](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2017/lover/lov-2017-06-16-47.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2017-06-16-47.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2017-06-16-47.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2017-06-16-47.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2017-06-16-47.md) |
| [Lov om gjennomføring av konvensjon 19. oktober 1996 om jurisdiksjon, lovvalg, an](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2015-09-04-85.md) | Lov om Haagkonvensjonen 1996 | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2015-09-04-85) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2015-09-04-85.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2015-09-04-85.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2015-09-04-85.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2015-09-04-85.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2015-09-04-85.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2015-09-04-85.md) |
| [Lov om godkjenning av klageorganer for forbrukersaker (godkjenningsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2016-06-17-29.md) | Godkjenningsloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2016-06-17-29) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2016-06-17-29.md) · [v2016](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2016/lover/lov-2016-06-17-29.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2016-06-17-29.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2016-06-17-29.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2016-06-17-29.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2016-06-17-29.md) |
| [Lov om gravplasser, kremasjon og gravferd (gravplassloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1996-06-07-32.md) | Gravplassloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1996-06-07-32) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1996-06-07-32.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1996-06-07-32.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1996-06-07-32.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1996-06-07-32.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1996-06-07-32.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1996-06-07-32.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1996-06-07-32.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1996-06-07-32.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1996-06-07-32.md) |
| [Lov om helligdager og helligdagsfred](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1995-02-24-12.md) | Helligdagsfredloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1995-02-24-12) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1995-02-24-12.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1995-02-24-12.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1995-02-24-12.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1995-02-24-12.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1995-02-24-12.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1995-02-24-12.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1995-02-24-12.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1995-02-24-12.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1995-02-24-12.md) |
| [Lov om informasjonstilgang m.m. for Barnevoldsutvalget](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2016-05-27-13.md) | Lov om informasjonstilgang m.m. for Barnevoldsutvalget | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2016-05-27-13) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2016-05-27-13.md) · [v2016](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2016/lover/lov-2016-05-27-13.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2016-05-27-13.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2016-05-27-13.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2016-05-27-13.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2016-05-27-13.md) |
| [Lov om informasjonstilgang m.m. for utvalget som skal granske utenlandsadopsjone](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2024-04-12-16.md) | Lov om informasjonstilgang, gransking av utenlandsadopsjoner | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2024-04-12-16) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2024-04-12-16.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2024-04-12-16.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2024-04-12-16.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2024-04-12-16.md) |
| [Lov om informasjonstilgang mv. for Statens helsetilsyn ved gjennomgang av et utv](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2017-03-24-10.md) | Lov om informasjonstilgang mv. for Statens helsetilsyn | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2017-03-24-10) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2017-03-24-10.md) · [v2017](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2017/lover/lov-2017-03-24-10.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2017-03-24-10.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2017-03-24-10.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2017-03-24-10.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2017-03-24-10.md) |
| [Lov om innkreving av underholdsbidrag mv. (bidragsinnkrevingsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2005-04-29-20.md) | Bidragsinnkrevingsloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2005-04-29-20) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2005-04-29-20.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-2005-04-29-20.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-2005-04-29-20.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2005-04-29-20.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2005-04-29-20.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2005-04-29-20.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2005-04-29-20.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2005-04-29-20.md) |
| [Lov om kommunale krisesentertilbod (krisesenterlova)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2009-06-19-44.md) | Krisesenterlova | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2009-06-19-44) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2009-06-19-44.md) · [v2009](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2009/lover/lov-2009-06-19-44.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-2009-06-19-44.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2009-06-19-44.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2009-06-19-44.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2009-06-19-44.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2009-06-19-44.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2009-06-19-44.md) |
| [Lov om kontantstøtte til småbarnsforeldre (kontantstøtteloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1998-06-26-41.md) | Kontantstøtteloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1998-06-26-41) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1998-06-26-41.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1998-06-26-41.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1998-06-26-41.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1998-06-26-41.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1998-06-26-41.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1998-06-26-41.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1998-06-26-41.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1998-06-26-41.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1998-06-26-41.md) |
| [Lov om kontroll med markedsføring og avtalevilkår mv. (markedsføringsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2009-01-09-2.md) | Markedsføringsloven – mfl | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2009-01-09-2) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2009-01-09-2.md) · [v2009](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2009/lover/lov-2009-01-09-2.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-2009-01-09-2.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2009-01-09-2.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2009-01-09-2.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2009-01-09-2.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2009-01-09-2.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2009-01-09-2.md) |
| [Lov om merking av forbruksvarer mv. (forbrukermerkeloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1981-12-18-90.md) | Forbrukermerkeloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1981-12-18-90) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1981-12-18-90.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1981-12-18-90.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1981-12-18-90.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1981-12-18-90.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1981-12-18-90.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1981-12-18-90.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1981-12-18-90.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1981-12-18-90.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1981-12-18-90.md) |
| [Lov om når norsk tenestemakt kan halda brudvigjing i utlandet og utenlandsk tene](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1955-06-30-20.md) | Lov om brudvigjing i utlandet | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1955-06-30-20) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1955-06-30-20.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1955-06-30-20.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1955-06-30-20.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1955-06-30-20.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1955-06-30-20.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1955-06-30-20.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1955-06-30-20.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1955-06-30-20.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1955-06-30-20.md) |
| [Lov om opplysningsplikt og angrerett ved fjernsalg og salg utenom faste forretni](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2014-06-20-27.md) | Angrerettloven – angrl | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2014-06-20-27) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2014-06-20-27.md) · [v2014](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2014/lover/lov-2014-06-20-27.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2014-06-20-27.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2014-06-20-27.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2014-06-20-27.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2014-06-20-27.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2014-06-20-27.md) |
| [Lov om pakkereiser og reisegaranti mv. (pakkereiseloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2018-06-15-32.md) | Pakkereiseloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2018-06-15-32) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2018-06-15-32.md) · [v2018](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2018/lover/lov-2018-06-15-32.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2018-06-15-32.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2018-06-15-32.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2018-06-15-32.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2018-06-15-32.md) |
| [Lov om stans i utbetalinga av offentlege ytingar og barnebidrag når ein av forel](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2014-06-06-19.md) | Lov om stans i utbetalinger etter barnebortføring | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2014-06-06-19) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2014-06-06-19.md) · [v2014](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2014/lover/lov-2014-06-06-19.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2014-06-06-19.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2014-06-06-19.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2014-06-06-19.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2014-06-06-19.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2014-06-06-19.md) |
| [Lov om tros- og livssynssamfunn (trossamfunnsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2020-04-24-31.md) | Trossamfunnsloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2020-04-24-31) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2020-04-24-31.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2020-04-24-31.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2020-04-24-31.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2020-04-24-31.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2020-04-24-31.md) |
| [Lov om virksomheters åpenhet og arbeid med grunnleggende menneskerettigheter og ](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2021-06-18-99.md) | Åpenhetsloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2021-06-18-99) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2021-06-18-99.md) · [v2021](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2021/lover/lov-2021-06-18-99.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2021-06-18-99.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2021-06-18-99.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2021-06-18-99.md) |
